scope: Consolidated closure of the duplicate/race/idempotency risk zone for known write-flow surfaces in the Full Evaluation reconciliation matrix. Separate live-browser/provider zones remain tracked independently.
contract: same clientRequestId/idempotency key or same no-op retry returns the existing resource/result without duplicate side effects
different clientRequestId/user intent creates a separate resource where the product flow allows it
concurrent duplicate requests are serialized by DB uniqueness/advisory locks/optimistic conflict contracts
readback after write confirms persisted state and bounded audit/event side effects
permission-denied paths remain explicit 403/409/404 contracts, not internal_error

newlyClosedSurfaces.expected: same clientRequestId returns same meeting id, one meeting_created audit
newlyClosedSurfaces.evidence: apps/api/src/collaborationRoutes.db.test.ts keeps duplicate meeting create, external link and note requests idempotent

newlyClosedSurfaces.expected: same clientRequestId scoped to meeting returns same link id, one external_meeting_link_added audit
newlyClosedSurfaces.evidence: apps/api/src/collaborationRoutes.db.test.ts keeps duplicate meeting create, external link and note requests idempotent

newlyClosedSurfaces.expected: same clientRequestId scoped to meeting returns same note id; different key creates a second note; audit count matches real intents
newlyClosedSurfaces.scenario: meeting note double-submit/concurrent duplicate and second intent
newlyClosedSurfaces.evidence: apps/api/src/collaborationRoutes.db.test.ts keeps duplicate meeting create, external link and note requests idempotent

newlyClosedSurfaces.expected: same clientRequestId scoped to task returns same activity id; different key creates a second comment; audit count matches real intents
newlyClosedSurfaces.scenario: task comment double-submit/concurrent duplicate and second intent
newlyClosedSurfaces.evidence: apps/api/src/projectWorkRoutes.db.test.ts keeps duplicate task comment requests idempotent by client request id

previouslyClosedRepresentativeSurfaces: planning idempotency keys and scenario/apply-command-batch concurrency
admin/user/access-role duplicate conflicts and security policy/user-status retries
notification read and notification-preference duplicate writes
project work task create/status/archive/PATCH optimistic-concurrency paths

verification.command: DATABASE_URL=<local-test-db> node_modules/.bin/vitest.cmd --config vitest.db.config.ts apps/api/src/collaborationRoutes.db.test.ts -t "keeps duplicate meeting create"
DATABASE_URL=<local-test-db> node_modules/.bin/vitest.cmd --config vitest.db.config.ts apps/api/src/projectWorkRoutes.db.test.ts -t "keeps duplicate task comment"

verification.result: pass; 9 tests passed; rerun outside sandbox after sandbox EPERM

implementation: Added write_flow_idempotency_keys table with tenant/surface/actor/clientRequestId primary key
Meeting create/link/note and task comment routes claim an idempotency key before creating side effects
Subresource surfaces are scoped by parent meetingId/taskId to avoid cross-parent key collisions
Duplicate path reads and returns existing resource without appending success audit/event side effects
remainingRisk: No known remaining write-flow race/idempotency surfaces from the current reconciliation inventory are left in this risk zone. Remaining open work is tracked in separate risk zones for full-browser traversal, live media/provider behavior, and live email reset readback.
